questions.question: What is the young person in the yellow shirt doing at the track?
questions.answer_key: Standing and smiling at an athletic stadium or training facility
questions.rationale: Establishes main subject and setting during opening high-need window (0-3s)

questions.question: What athletic equipment is visible on the track field?
questions.answer_key: High jump bar and standards with a landing mat beneath
questions.rationale: Key visual context for understanding the athletic activity in high-need window (6-8.9s)

questions.question: What is the person attempting to do with the high jump bar?
questions.answer_key: Jump over the horizontal bar using the high jump technique
questions.rationale: Main action occurs in critical high-need window (8.9-14.9s) where visual info is most missed

questions.question: Describe the location and setting where this athletic activity takes place.
questions.answer_key: Professional or school athletic stadium with red track, field, and spectator areas
questions.rationale: Spatial context helps blind listener understand the athletic venue and environment

questions.question: What color is the landing mat beneath the high jump bar?
questions.answer_key: Blue and red colored mat positioned under the jump apparatus
questions.rationale: Safety equipment detail relevant to understanding the high jump setup and sport
